mapper.select: SELECT id, title, content, publisher, publish_time, status, create_time, update_time FROM announcement ORDER BY publish_time DESC, create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO announcement (title, content, publisher, publish_time, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{publisher}, #{publishTime}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE announcement SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, publisher = #{publisher}, publish_time = #{publishTime}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
